issues.title: Improve first use experience following installation of new Terminal application
issues.suggested_reply:
Thanks @tauheedul — this is detailed and useful feedback. The latest community update suggests there is still a first-run edge case even after #262: <!-- from comment -->I faced the same first run issues, even after this MR(#262) has been merged. I'm not exactly sure why.<!-- /from comment -->

I’d keep this open as a first-run/agent UX follow-up rather than asking for basic repro info again. The screenshots show the remaining confusing states, including <!-- from image -->"PowerShell execution policy is blocking scripts."<!-- /from image --> and <!-- from image -->"Access to the path 'C:\Users\rushil\Documents\PowerShell\powershell.config.json' is denied."<!-- /from image -->.

Suggested next step for the team: re-check the post-#262 FRE flow around Copilot install/auth retry, shell-integration policy detection, and whether the UI should route users to `copilot login` or an in-app sign-in button when the pane is disconnected.

issues.title: Per-tab AI agents via a multi-agent wta-master (id-based, GPO-aware)
issues.suggested_reply: @DDKinger — community PR #296 touches `tools/wta/src/master/mod.rs` and `tools/wta/src/session_registry.rs` (high-churn WTA master/session routing area). 7-day SLA clock starts today. Worth a first pass?

issues.title: Investigate commands on PATH before answering / autofixing (#287)
Add initial devcontainer configuration
issues.suggested_reply: Hi @johnnyh3611-bit, CI is failing on `check-spelling`: the new `.devcontainer/devcontainer.json` references `mcr.microsoft.com/devcontainers/universal:2`, and `mcr` is currently flagged as an unrecognized word. Could you take a look at https://github.com/microsoft/intelligent-terminal/actions/runs/28291258531/job/83823794702? If it is a false positive, adding the term to the repo's spelling allow/expect metadata should unblock the PR.
